description_long: This is a classic coupe car with a deep, glossy burgundy body and a contrasting beige hardtop roof. The vehicle features pronounced chrome accents on the front grille, bumpers, and side trim, giving it a vintage, luxurious appearance. The front end is characterized by a prominent central grille and dual headlights, while the rear showcases elegant tail fins and a circular chrome detail on the trunk. The side profile reveals a streamlined, elongated body with two doors and sleek, flush-mounted windows. The wheels are partially covered by fender skirts, enhancing the car's aerodynamic look. Antennas on the roof and detailed trim work further emphasize its retro styling.
description: A vintage burgundy coupe car with a beige hardtop, chrome accents, and pronounced tail fins, exuding classic luxury and style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central grille, dual headlights, and chrome bumper details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated body, beige hardtop, two doors, and chrome side trim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail fins, circular chrome trunk detail, and rear bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the streamlined profile, two doors, and chrome accents.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
